trace_records_snapshot.content: Use the work browser session to open a page and print basic page info, and keep bad indirect invocation examples as fixture text.

content.text: I will store indirect harness invocations as fixture text first.

input.content:
Bad examples for CLI tests only:
uv run browser-harness
python -m browser_harness.run
python src/browser_harness/run.py

Live checks must call browser-harness directly on PATH.

content.text: I will read the usage guidance before the live check.
The command calls browser-harness directly; the BU_NAME prefix only selects the session namespace.

input.command:
# Fixture only: uv run browser-harness
# Fixture only: python -m browser_harness.run
BU_NAME=work browser-harness <<'PY'
new_tab('https://example.com')
wait_for_load()
print(page_info())
PY
true

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

PYTHONPATH=src python -m browser_harness.run <<'PY' || true
print(page_info())
PY
